name: Asia-London Range Breakout XAUUSD M5
hypothesis: After an Asia-session accumulation range of moderate size (0.5-2.0x ATR), XAUUSD exhibits directional expansion during the London open window; breakouts with strong body displacement produce positive expectancy when filtered by ATR regime.

entry_rules.long: london_window AND close > asia_range.high + 0.5*atr AND candle_body >= 1.2*atr AND (asia_range.high - asia_range.low) BETWEEN 0.5*atr AND 2.0*atr
entry_rules.short: london_window AND close < asia_range.low - 0.5*atr AND candle_body >= 1.2*atr AND (asia_range.high - asia_range.low) BETWEEN 0.5*atr AND 2.0*atr

regime_filter.comment: Avoid dead ranges and blowoff volatility

time_stop.comment: ~2h on M5; close by NY open if stalled
